title: The Jewel of Angkor: Banteay Srei Temple

Due to its hardness, the stone used at Banteay Srei has retained sharpness and finishing, even after a millennium of exposure to sun, wind, rain, wildlife and natural erosion. In 1936, Banteay Srei’s foundation stele was discovered, which gives 967 CE as year of foundation. The early date of the temple’s foundation has perplexed archaeologists.
